C0900A_RCALL_CRNT_SEASN_CD C0900A_RCALL_CRNT_SEASN_CD C0900A Staff Assessment of Mental Status - Recalls Current Season Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indentifies whether or not the resident was able to recall the current season. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
107 C0900B_RCALL_LCTN_ROOM_CD C0900B_RCALL_LCTN_ROOM_CD C0900B Staff Assessment of Mental Status - Recalls Location of Room Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indentifies
